description: Rewrite corrective actions into concrete, non-blaming actions.

fixtures.prompt: Scenario: packaging line changeover with a jammed carton sensor. Reword the corrective action so it is concrete, owned, and non-blaming. Return JSON only.

expectedShape.humanReviewNote: Reviewer checks usefulness, safety-domain fit, and whether the output avoids inventing facts.
